en.brandSub: Reviewed knowledge base and AI assistant
en.disclaimer: This service is not an official institutional platform unless explicitly operated by your institution. Verify important matters with official sources.
en.chatEmpty: Ask a question about onboarding, policies, projects, services, facilities, or community life. Answers should be grounded in reviewed sources whenever possible.

routingModes.domain_engine: Structured engine for high-precision domain questions, such as courses, company policies, project runbooks, or product catalogs.
routingModes.hybrid: Combine structured engine output with RAG evidence when both are useful.
